about: PSHKRV Studio is a Milan-based design practice founded by Sergii Pushkarov. We work at the intersection of art direction, brand identity, and digital design.
We partner with cultural institutions, independent brands, and ambitious founders to create visual systems that endure — built on rigor, not trend.

approach.title: Concept before execution
approach.body: Every project begins with a clear point of view. We invest in thinking before making — because design without concept is just decoration.

approach.title: Constraint as creative force
approach.body: Limitations produce clarity. We work within briefs, budgets, and timelines as creative constraints, not obstacles.

approach.title: Craft at every scale
approach.body: From a business card to a 200-page catalogue, the same level of typographic care and visual precision applies.
